one_line: Wrote a grounded rebuttal-anticipation doc: 10 steelmanned reviewer attacks (small-N, construct validity, reconstruction leakage, flat RFT 0.522->0.491, reward-hacking, 0.86 fixed point, single-domain, circular judge, unpinned gateways, REx-novelty) each with an honest response + probability/depth severity, plus attacks.json and a stdlib validator that passes (exit 0).
